title.en: Of course, most of them can't practice this pat...

content.en:
Subsequently.

The Ten Elements Ancestor talked about the key points of breaking the shackles and the general aspects that need to be paid attention to.

Of course, most of them can't practice this path, so they don't care.

However, they all know very well that from today onwards, the value of the Cursed Black Stone and the Life White Stone will skyrocket, and the value will increase many times to the point where it is impossible to find.

Many Eternal Masters are regretting that if they know that if they collect more Cursed Black Stones and Life White Stones, they will make a lot of money, and they can sell them to other Eternal Masters who need them if they don't need them!

Soon after, the Ten Elements Ancestor finished speaking and let the disciples leave.

......

Void Zone.

Ye Tian was pondering the shackles and chains of the primordial-level control body, once the shackles and chains were broken, the primordial-level control body would become stronger and stronger.

For him, it is also a shortcut to improve his strength.

If it was possible, he wouldn't even need to open up the Boundary River to break the Ten Realms-level Masters realm.

At this time, there were some cursed black stones on him, but there were not many of them.

In fact, not only did he not have much, but also the other Eternal Masters, because many cursed black stones had been acquired by the Black Emperor Ancestor through various channels.

At the beginning, the other Eternal Masters didn't know the value of the cursed blackstone, so they didn't pay much attention to it.

Now, those who are the eternal masters of the sale of the cursed blackstone are afraid of remorse.

"I don't have any life stones on me, I need to collect some!"

Ye Tian went to the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce, but got bad news.

Life White Stone, no!

Not only is there no Life White Stone, but even the Cursed Black Stone is gone, it has long been acquired, and no one sells the Cursed Black Stone anymore.

"One by one, the movements are very fast!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Right now, unless you spend a lot of money to buy some Cursed Blackstone or Life White Stone from some Eternal Master who doesn't need to curse Blackstone, or go to the end of the world to find Cursed Blackstone and Life White Stone.

"It's more reliable to use the second way!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, there are too many eternal controllers who have acquired the Cursed Black Stone and the Life White Stone, and he may not be able to acquire them now, and he still has to compete with those Ten Realm-level controllers, but he can't compete with them, unless he comes up with a large amount of Primal Spirit Spring Liquid to trade, but in that case, it will be too attention-grabbing.

Therefore, he prepared to go on his own to find the Cursed Blackstone and the Living Whitestone.

In the end of the world, the cursed black stone and the life white stone, although they are very rare, they can still be found in some places, but no one cared about it before, so there are almost no eternal controllers who specifically look for the cursed black stone, and it is estimated that only the Black Emperor Ancestor has specifically gone to find the cursed black stone.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian specifically learned about the place where the Curse Black Stone and the Life White Stone were easy to be born.

Eventually, Ye Tian was given several locations.

Blackstone Domain!

Baiyun Mountain!

Tianhu Sea!

Death Netherworld!

......

These are the depths of the Realm, where it is easier to give birth to the Cursed Blackstone and the Living White Stone.

Among them, Tianhu Sea is the easiest to give birth to the White Stone of Life.

Ye Tian was now very short of life white stones, so he went to Tianhu Sea as soon as possible.

He also knew very well that there must be a lot of strong people who went to Tianhu Sea now, not only him, but even several of his senior brothers and sisters were very likely to send a will clone to Tianhu Sea to find the White Stone of Life.

Under such competition, how many life white stones he can obtain depends on luck.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, Ye Tian finally arrived at Tianhu Sea.

......

Tianhu Sea.

This place is located in the depths of the Realm, and the surrounding time and space are extremely chaotic, only here is extremely calm.

The Tianhu Sea is very large, and the reason why the time and space here are calm is because the suppression here is very large, so that the time and space tend to be extremely stable.

For the Eternal Controller, the suppression here is also extremely terrifying, once they enter the Heavenly Lake Sea, it is like hundreds of millions of time and space compressed, and ordinary Eternal Controllers cannot bear this kind of suppression.

Basically, the Eternal Masters who can enter here and walk freely are almost all those above the Seven Realms.

"According to the information we know, almost all of the living white stones are at the bottom of the Tianhu Sea, and there is a strange life in the Tianhu Sea-Tianhu Beast!"

Ye Tian didn't know much about the Heavenly Lake Beast, but he knew that this kind of Heavenly Lake Beast might not be powerful in the outside world, but in the Heavenly Lake Sea, he could mobilize the power of the Heavenly Lake Sea, and he could easily suppress the Seven Realm-level controllers or even the Eighth Realm-level controllers, and some of the extremely powerful Heavenly Lake Beasts could even be compared to the Nine Realms-level controllers.

Of course, the Celestial Lake Beasts have a gentle nature, and as long as they don't provoke them, they won't attack the Eternal Masters.

Ye Tian went deep into the Heavenly Lake Sea, constantly looking for the White Stone of Life.

Time passed slowly, and during this time, he also ran into other Eternal Masters, but everyone was silently searching, and there was no communication at all.

this day.

Ye Tian's copying talent detected seven or eight Heavenly Lake Beasts, which was obviously a small group of Heavenly Lake Beasts.

Originally, Ye Tian didn't care, but when he approached this group of Heavenly Lake Beasts, he actually sensed the breath of the Life White Stone nearby.

The breath of the Life White Stone is almost difficult to perceive, it must be very close to be able to perceive its existence, and it is precisely because of this that the Life White Stone is difficult to find.

This time, Ye Tian sensed that there were a lot of life white stones, there were hundreds of them, and in an undersea mountain range, the breath of life white stones made the life force here become a little abnormal.

And it is these abnormal life energies that truly expose the White Stone of Life.

The strength of these Heavenly Lake Beasts is not very strong, so Ye Tian made an instant move, took away these Life White Stones, and then left quickly, not entangled with these Heavenly Lake Beasts.

At first, Ye Tian thought it was just a coincidence.

But one day, he once again discovered that the place where the Heavenly Lake Beasts gathered had a lot of life white stones.

At this moment, Ye Tian confirmed a little.

"The place where the Heavenly Lake Beasts gather should be their lair, and the reason why the Heavenly Lake Beasts use the place where the Life White Stone is located as a nest place is that they like the breath of the Life White Stone, or in that environment, it is more beneficial to them. "

"If that's the case, I only need to keep using my copying talent to find the nests where the Tianhu Beasts gather in large numbers, and then I can find a large number of Life White Stones?"

Ye Tian thought so.
